_comment: Replace YOUR-DOMAIN.com everywhere, then generate accountAssociation at https://farcaster.xyz/~/developers/new (domain must match exactly, no https://, no path).

miniapp.name: Arena Champions '98
miniapp.subtitle: 3v3 retro team fighting
miniapp.description: Pick a team of 3 original fighters and battle in classic 90s arcade style. Fight the CPU or challenge friends to live PvP matches and climb the leaderboard.
miniapp.ogDescription: 3v3 retro arcade fighting with live PvP on Farcaster.
